_publications._publicationTitle: STING activation reprograms the microenvironment to sensitize NF1-related malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors for immunotherapy.

_contextSnippet: These allograft cis MPNSTs in athymic mice continued to grow despite ADU-S100 treatment, suggesting that the immune inflammation resulting from STING activation was mediated by T cells
details: Allograft cis MPNSTs in nude mice continued to grow despite ADU-S100 treatment, suggesting immune inflammation from STING activation was T cell-mediated
